# reloadData()

**Instance Method**

Reloads the data for a slideshow.

## Declaration

```swift
func reloadData()
```

## Reloading Data

- **reloadItem(at:)**: Reloads the data for a slideshow, starting at the specified index.

items.description: Reloads the data for a slideshow, starting at the specified index.
items.name: reloadItem(at:)
